sdr.description: SDR bundle: foundational + cross-cutting + meta skills, the SDR skill set, all agents/commands, and the hook + instinct runtime.

ae.description: AE bundle: foundational + cross-cutting + meta skills, the full AE skill set, all agents/commands, and the hook + instinct runtime.

sales-manager.description: Sales-manager bundle: foundational + cross-cutting + meta skills, the manager skill set (pipeline/forecast/coaching/QBR/territory), all agents/commands, and the hook + instinct runtime.

revops.description: RevOps bundle: foundational + cross-cutting + meta skills, the RevOps skill set (deal desk/reporting/routing/dedupe/capacity/methodology), all agents/commands, and the hook + instinct runtime.

full.description: Everything: all skill groups (SDR, AE, manager, RevOps, foundational, cross-cutting, meta), all agents/commands/rules, the full hook + instinct runtime, statusline, MCP templates, and docs.
